title: Properly translate users into runc format for exec
body:
Runc exec expects the --user flag to be formatted as UID:GID.
Use chrootuser code to translate whatever user is passed to exec
into this format.

Fixes #1314

comments.body: Needs tests still - will write them after lunch

I tested your code, it works fine for me:

```
podman exec --user=root keystone ls
anaconda-post.log
bin
boot
dev
etc
home
lib
lib64
media
mnt
openstack
opt
proc
root
run
run_command
sbin
srv
sys
tmp
usr
var
```
Travis timed out, not sure why...
Added tests. I think the Fedora registry is having issues, though, so CI is probably broken.
One of the tests I added is failing - will look into it
